issues.description: Card has clear On Play effect but effects array is empty. Should contain effect that sets opponent character cost to 0 with duration limited to current turn.
Missing action to modify cost. No equivalent action exists in DSL; closest would be PowerBoost with negative value, but cost modification is not directly supported. This is a gap in DSL vocabulary.
Effect applies 'during this turn' which requires duration:'DuringYourTurn', not Permanent or EndOfTurn
